questions.question: What must you call in beforeEach to ensure each Pinia test gets isolated store state?
When testing a Pinia store that uses another store, how do they share the same state?
options: You must manually link them with store.$patch()
Both store composable calls use the same Pinia instance created in beforeEach
You must import the second store inside the test and call setActivePinia() again
Pinia automatically creates a shared context when two stores are used in the same test

questions.question: What does store.$onAction() enable in tests?
options: Observing which actions were dispatched and with what arguments
Replacing store actions with mock implementations
Subscribing to state changes before they are applied
Preventing actions from modifying state during testing
